box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
couples force of infection:
π_i = Σ_j C_ij · I*_j / N*_j

div.div: No land ⇒ C = I ⇒ π_i = I_i/N_i (recovers plain diffusive). Recurrent vs diffusive commuting ≈ 5× lower peak on Europe air+land.
